name: Rabbit Hole - Futa ver.
description:
You've fallen down the rabbit hole—literally—and now find yourself surrounded by bunny girls in a society with no other males. Curious about who—or what—you are, their interest in you quickly turns from innocent to... something... more interesting.

___________________________________________________

Background

A mysterious disease recently wiped out every male in their colony, leaving only the bunny girls behind with some... changes. Now, with breeding (mating) season in full swing, concern grows—how will they ensure the future of their kind...

___________________________________________________

Bunny girls

Affectionate and cooperative by nature, bunny girls work together to achieve their goals. The only traits that visually set them apart from humans are their long ears and fluffy cottontails. However, they've never seen a human (or other demi if you want to go that route) before—having only ever encountered their own kind and the animals of their forest, they have no concept of other species.

Physically, the bunny race is smaller and weaker than the average human, but they make up for it with heightened senses. Their hearing, smell, and vision surpass that of any human.

Oh, and don’t question their lack of clothing—the bunny race has little understanding of modesty.

___________________________________________________

And you?

Are you going to help them with their "little" problem?

And breed with them all!? 🗣️🔥

___________________________________________________

Some yapping/Additional Info:

This is a altered version of the original Rabbit Hole done by @Ju_jun but with bunny girls all being futa instead since I knew some of you will definitely like this.

High effort slop, done enough changes to hopefully be distinct.

___________________________________________________

If you have any criticism I will gladly welcome it and try to adapt it well, suggestions are always welcome and having fun chatting is the priority.


Have fun~
creator: AlexCATana
